title: Scholarship Support Program Launch
description: Engolon Foundation is mobilizing support to help Maasai girls access school fees, uniforms, books, and other essential learning materials.

title: Community Awareness Meeting in Laikipia North
description: Community conversations are helping parents, guardians, and leaders protect girls from early marriages and support education.

title: Mentorship Program for Maasai Girls
description: Mentors and tutors are being connected with girls to provide academic guidance, encouragement, and personal development support.
